scores.notes: The OCR output has several issues: text accuracy is compromised by missing words and incorrect formatting (e.g., 'Sweet&Sour133' instead of 'Sweet & Sour 133'). Table structure is partially preserved but with misalignment and incorrect data placement. Numeric precision is mostly accurate but some values are misplaced. Layout preservation is moderate, with some sections and headers maintained but others disrupted. Completeness is affected by missing and garbled text.
